title: Zander the Great
director: George W. Hill, Clarence G. Badger
writer: Frances Marion, Salisbury Field, Lillie Hayward
actors: Marion Davies, Holbrook Blinn, Harrison Ford
plot: Mamie, an orphan girl who was abused in the orphanage, is taken in by Mrs. Caldwell, a kind woman with a young son named Alexander. Mamie hits it off with the lad and nicknames him "Zander". When Mrs. Caldwell dies, the authoritie...
